response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is significantly overqualified and senior for an entry-level role, with over 15 years of professional development history including staff and founder roles; their resume shows minimal focus on React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL as required, and their German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site presence being mandatory in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js across multiple domains
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking (e.g., GISCollective, MCP frameworks)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver production-grade systems
concerns: Far exceeds seniority level expected for an entry-level individual contributor role
Lacks clear evidence of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL experience as required
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
